Title: Judges
Author: Cat and Storm
Summary: A dystopian story about a woman who enters a forbidden zone where participants undergo brutal trials under the watchful eyes of anonymous judges. The narrative blends psychological horror, violence, and control, with consequences for rule-breaking that include lethal outcomes.
Key Strengths: Unique setting (forbidden zone with strict control system)
Potential for plot branching (multiple rule-violation scenarios)
Strong visual and auditory elements (masks, cameras, detectors)
Areas for Improvement: Conflict progression could be faster for increased pacing
Clarify the moral code of the system for deeper conflict

Expansion Ideas: TV series focusing on psychological aspects
